name: runtrace
description: Persistent experiment memory and run tracking for autonomous research agents.

interface.shortDescription: Shared experiment memory for research agents
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a self-hosted RunTrace instance. Retrieve prior evidence, coordinate experiments, record outcomes, and generate safe project-scoped RTVis visualizations through the bundled MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Review prior RunTrace evidence before starting this experiment
Record this experiment and its outcome in RunTrace
Find related failed or successful runs in RunTrace
Generate a visualization for this data in RunTrace
